original_hypothesis.title: emergencyWithdraw Drains Artist Funds Without Zeroing collectionTotalAmount
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: emergencyWithdraw sends the entire MinterContract balance to adminsContract.owner() but does not zero any collectionTotalAmount entries. After withdrawal, the contract has 0 balance but positive collectionTotalAmount values. payArtist can still be called (collectionTotalAmount > 0), but the ETH transfers fail silently (no funds), and collectionTotalAmount is zeroed. Artists permanently lose their earnings.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The accounting inconsistency between balance withdrawal and tracking state means emergencyWithdraw creates a state where payArtist succeeds but distributes nothing.

proof_of_signal.pattern: emergencyWithdraw sends address(this).balance without updating any collectionTotalAmount; payArtist at lines 415-440 checks collectionTotalAmount > 0 but doesn't check actual balance

preconditions: Function admin calls emergencyWithdraw while collectionTotalAmount > 0 for one or more collections

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: Balance withdrawal without state accounting update
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: collectionTotalAmount stays positive after balance is drained; payArtist zeroes it but sends 0 ETH
initial_code_evidence.missing_safeguards: emergencyWithdraw should zero all collectionTotalAmount, or payArtist should check actual balance

analysis_questions: Is emergencyWithdraw intended as a last resort that should never coexist with payArtist?
Can the owner restore funds by sending ETH back to the contract?
Does this create a practical rug-pull vector?
validation_requirements: Call emergencyWithdraw with pending artist payments
Call payArtist and verify 0 ETH distributed
Verify collectionTotalAmount zeroed despite no actual payment

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Admin calls emergencyWithdraw, draining all contract ETH including pending artist payments. Artists call for payment (or admin calls payArtist). collectionTotalAmount > 0 passes the check. Five .call transfers send 0 value (contract empty). All succeed (sending 0 ETH succeeds). collectionTotalAmount zeroed. Artists received nothing.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Total loss of all pending artist and team payments across all collections
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All artists and teams with unclaimed payments
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Only if owner manually returns funds before payArtist is called

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for emergencyWithdraw + payArtist interaction

technical_investigation_focus.detection_analysis: emergencyWithdraw event followed by zero-value payArtist events

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
